title: Add security penetration tests
original_text: Added security penetration testing using OWASP ZAP. Implemented automated security scanning for vulnerabilities. Added tests for SQL injection, XSS, and CSRF. Implemented authentication bypass testing. Added authorization testing for all endpoints. Implemented sensitive data exposure testing. Added security test reporting. Result: no critical vulnerabilities found.
expected_subject: test(security): add penetration testing with OWASP ZAP
expected_body_lines: - Add tests for SQL injection, XSS, and CSRF
- Add authorization testing for all endpoints
expected_command: git commit -m "test(security): add penetration testing with OWASP ZAP"
